properties.verseOrder: v1 v1 v2 v1 v3 v1 v4 v1 v5 v1

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Won’t we have a time When we get over yonder? Won’t we have a time When we get over yonder? Won’t we have a time When we get over yonder? Ohhhhhh! Won’t we have a time?

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We’ll see King Jesus there When we get over yonder; We’ll see King Jesus there When we get over yonder; We’ll see King Jesus there When we get over yonder. Ohhhhhh! Won’t we have a time?

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We will sing and shout, and dance about When we get over yonder; We will sing and shout, and dance about When we get over yonder; We will sing and shout, and dance about When we get over yonder. Ohhhhhh! Won’t we have a time?

verse.name: v4
v5
